chapter_title.en: Chapter on the wife's Rights Over Her Husband

text: اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "رَحِمَ اَللَّهُ عَبْداً أَحْسَنَ فِيمَا بَيْنَهُ وَ بَيْنَ زَوْجَتِهِ، فَإِنَّ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ قَدْ مَلَّكَهُ نَاصِيَتَهَا وَ جَعَلَهُ اَلْقَيِّمَ عَلَيْهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4537 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"May Allah (swt) have mercy on a servant who treats his wife well, for Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, has given him authority over her and made him her guardian."
